mapper.select: SELECT itinerary_version FROM trip.trips WHERE id = #{tripId} AND status != 'DELETED'
SELECT id, trip_id, group_type, day_number, date, title, sort_order FROM itinerary.itinerary_days WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, day_number ASC NULLS LAST, id ASC

SELECT id, itinerary_day_id, sort_order, item_type, place_provider, external_place_id, place_name, address, lat, lng, thumbnail_url, source_status FROM itinerary.itinerary_items WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY itinerary_day_id ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, origin_itinerary_item_id, destination_itinerary_item_id, mode, provider, provider_profile, geometry_format, geometry::text AS geometry, distance_meters, duration_seconds, confidence FROM itinerary.trip_routes WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, itinerary_day_id, drawing_type, geometry_format, geometry::text AS geometry, style::text AS style, label, sort_order, version FROM itinerary.map_drawings WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC
